title: Calendar Stamp!
excerpt: One of my favorite new products for the Yes, Please collection is definitely the calendar stamp . And it's in stock in limited quantities right now at Two Peas In A Bucket and Simon Says Stamp . It was fun…
body:
One of my favorite new products for the Yes, Please collection is definitely the calendar stamp.

And it's in stock in limited quantities right now at Two Peas In A Bucket and Simon Says Stamp. It was fun reading all your favorite techniques of the moment in this post.

The winner of the autographed copy of my book is: #52 - Michelle Congrats!
